title: The second forward difference of a constant state is zero

source.notes: First local finite-difference sanity check in the KdV conservative scaffold.

informal.statement: For a constant grid state, the second forward difference u(i+2)-2u(i+1)+u(i) is zero at every index.
assumptions: i is a natural-number grid index
informal.expected_conclusion: The second forward difference of the constant state is zero.

declarations.name: secondForwardDifference
declarations.statement: def secondForwardDifference (u : Nat -> Real) (i : Nat) : Real := u (i + 2) - 2 * u (i + 1) + u i

declarations.name: secondForwardDifference_const_zero
declarations.statement: theorem secondForwardDifference_const_zero (c : Real) (i : Nat) : secondForwardDifference (fun _ => c) i = 0

tasks.input: Translate the fact that the second forward difference of a constant grid state is zero into Lean 4.
tasks.target: theorem secondForwardDifference_const_zero (c : Real) (i : Nat) : secondForwardDifference (fun _ => c) i = 0

tasks.input: Given secondForwardDifference, complete the proof for a constant state.
tasks.target: A proof by unfolding secondForwardDifference and closing with ring.
